privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated presentation data (global_health_summit.odp) created by a Python script using odfpy. The presentation contains three intentional typos on Slide 2: 'distrubution' (should be 'distribution'), 'paitents' (should be 'patients'), and 'barriar' (should be 'barrier'). Slide 3 contains the French text starting with 'Nous devons collaborer' (meaning 'We must collaborate'), which is initially marked with English language settings (causing spellcheck errors). The expected language codes are 'fr' (ISO 639-1) and 'fra' (ISO 639-3), both valid codes for French. All metadata claims have been verified against the source code and authoritative standards.
